page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.large is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates moderate single-core performance but exhibits limitations under multi-core workloads. Single-core tests, such as stress-ng single-core CPU and Geekbench single-core, place the server in the average tier. However, multi-core benchmarks, including Geekbench multi-core and stress-ng multi-core, fall into the lower performance percentiles, reflecting the physical constraint of its dual-core configuration. Memory bandwidth benchmarks also register in the lower tiers, with large-block read and write speeds of 14.81 GB/sec and 13.68 GB/sec respectively.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r7se.large offers a specialized resource profile that prioritizes memory capacity over raw compute power. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require a larger memory footprint but do not demand intensive parallel processing or high-throughput storage operations. The instance is best suited for lightweight database hosting, caching layers, text processing, and basic web serving applications that benefit from its 16 GB memory allocation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.large is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark results indicate average single-core performance, but multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics fall into lower percentiles due to the dual-core design. With a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-sensitive workloads that do not require heavy parallel computing. It is best suited for lightweight database operations, caching, and basic web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.large is a memory-optimized instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-sensitive, low-compute workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized dual-core virtual server designed for lightweight database operations, caching, and memory-sensitive workloads requiring moderate compute power.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
